body: ## Purpose and Content - the dynamical sea ice from PR#50 needs to be tested and finalized as a stand-alone driver (addressing SDI #42 ), separate from the `moist_mpi_earth` directory, which will contain the prescribed sea ice and bucket model (PR#51 that addresses SDI #41 ). ### To do: - [x] separate example from the bucket / prescribed (`moist_mpi_earth`) directory - [x] energy conservation test - , neglecting the initial equilibration over the first 2 timesteps, up to 0.1% error after 27d - first 100 timesteps (dt =200s) - 27 days - [x] physical test - h_ice (m) https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/38083334/175771964-65e1b164-ee53-4cb3-9d3a-7151d5909236.mp4 ### Future PRs: - update for the latest interface (after #51 is ready) - add area fraction (apply to all examples) - prescribe albedo - make an abstraction for the sea ice model + thermal slab - replace heavisides with smooth functions - add regression test - add buildkite test - investigate if the small conservation error grows for longer integrations ## Benefits and Risks - benefit: finalizes the sea ice model development, which will be useful when testing all available ODE surface-model setups, when appraising the AMIP configuration. - risk: the dynamical sea ice is strictly speaking not needed for the first AMIP simulation (however, this is already implemented and only requires some time for testing. Completing it now will save time later. ) ## Linked Issues (Provide references to any link issues. Use closes #issuenum to automatically close an open issue) - Fixes # - Closes # ## PR Checklist - [x] This PR is linked to SDI #42. - [x] I have followed CliMA's codebase [contribution](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/) and [style](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) guidelines OR N/A. - [x] I have followed CliMA's [documentation policy](https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy). - [x] I have checked all issues and PRs and I certify that this PR does not duplicate an open PR. - [x] I linted my code on my local machine prior to submission OR N/A. - [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A. - [x] Code used in an integration test OR N/A. - [x] All tests ran successfully on my local machine OR N/A. - [x] All classes, modules, and function contain docstrings OR N/A. - [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Dynamical Sea Ice Model
